products.description: Crispy and classic, Tyson Frozen Crispy Chicken Breast Strips are an easy-to-prepare crowd-pleasing delight. Each fully cooked chicken breast strip is made with 100% all-natural* chicken and has no added hormones or steroids**. These chicken breast strips with rib meat are a simple addition to any meal, working great for salads, dipping, or on their own. Each serving contains 13 grams of protein and features a crispy golden breading. Keep frozen until ready to prepare, then cook in an air fryer or oven according to the directions for a warm and tasty bite. *Minimally processed, no artificial ingredients **Federal regulations prohibit the use of added. hormones or steroids in chicken.

products.description: Elevate your meals with Tyson Boneless  Skinless Fresh Chicken Breasts  a reliable source of natural protein. These delicious white meat chicken breasts are perfect for any sauce or seasoning  making them a versatile ingredient for your favorite recipes. Ideal for breading and frying in a skillet  grilling with your top BBQ sauce  or baking with your choice of marinade. Additionally  they serve well in slow-cooked dishes for easy  flavorful tacos. This generous pack allows for convenient meal prep \u2014 cook some now and store the rest in the freezer. For quick thawing  cut into slices or cubes and freeze on a baking sheet before placing in a freezer bag. Ready for swift defrosting when needed  Tyson chicken breasts are superb whether roasted  saut\u00E9ed  fried  grilled  or slow-cooked. Enhance your culinary repertoire effortlessly with Tyson Boneless  Skinless Chicken Breasts.

products.description: Elevate your meal times with the Great Value Famous Chicken Fillet. This scrumptious offering ensures that you enjoy premium quality  as it is prepared from 100% white meat chicken. Each fillet is masterfully coated in our proprietary homestyle breading  offering a tasteful crunch that is irresistible. With a generous 18g of protein per serving  this wholesome product is a perfect choice for those seeking nutrition without compromising on flavor. Conveniently frozen to maintain freshness  these fillets do not require any thawing. Simply cook in an air fryer or oven for a quick and no-fuss meal experience. Ideal for busy weeknights  school lunchboxes  or spontaneous weekend gatherings  our chicken fillets promise big taste in every bite. Embrace culinary creativity as you pair them with an array of dips  wraps  or transform them into mouth-watering sliders.

products.name: Great Value Grilled Chicken Breast Meat Fillet With Rib Meat
products.description: Make a delicious lunch or dinner that's not only bursting with flavor  but also quick and easy with these Great Value Grilled Chicken Breast Fillets. These are perfect to serve as an appetizer at your next game day watch party or to enjoy as a wonderful dinner any day of the week. Cook these yummy chicken breasts and enjoy with ranch  barbeque  and any other dipping sauces of your choice. They come in a convenient resealable bag to help maintain freshness. Take home the Great Value Grilled Chicken Breast Fillets today!Great Value products provide families with affordable  high-quality grocery and household consumable options. With our wide range of product categories spanning grocery and household consumables  we offer you a variety of products for your family's needs. Our products are conveniently available online and in Walmart stores nationwide  allowing you to stock up and save money at the same time.

products.name: Pilgrim's Pride Italian Style Chicken Breasts With Rib Meat
products.description: Gather the family around the dinner table and enjoy a meal together over our savory Great Value Bone-In Ham Steak. This ham is bursting with traditional  succulent flavor that's versatile and easily lends itself to a variety of exquisite dishes. Because the bone is left in  you can even make delicious homemade broths on a budget  which expands its versatility even further. You can easily pair this ham steak with beans for a classic ham and bean soup  pair it with mashed potatoes and green beans for a hardy meal or line it up with cheese and sliced bread to craft a mouth-watering hot ham and cheese sandwich. However you choose to enjoy it  our Great Value Bone-In Ham Steak is a convenient and delicious addition to any diet.Great Value products provide families with affordable  high-quality grocery and household consumable options.
